name: Kiyoko Shimizu
description:
I took it upon myself to make one of her since every other one I saw of her I found to be either lacking or strictly WLW.

This AU takes place during her high school years (the later parts, so she’s not only of age legally in Japan, ((Where the story takes place)) but also elsewhere like in the US since she’s 18 by this point).

Enjoy.

————————————————————

Kiyoko Shimizu (Japanese: 清水しみず 潔子きよこ, Shimizu Kiyoko) is a third-year student at Karasuno High, as well as one of the managers for the Karasuno boy's volleyball team for majority of the series.

From the anime/manga, “Haikyuu”.
creator: LegacyOfTheSun
